formdata.description: CSV or XLSX file to import (max 5MB). Column headers must match schema property names exactly.

body.raw:
{
  "cropCategoryId": "cropcategory-12345",
  "cropCategoryName": "Cereals",
  "name": "Teff",
  "scientificName": "Eragrostis tef",
  "centre": "Debre Zeit Agricultural Research Center",
  "varietiesCount": 42,
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/images/teff.png",
  "description": "Teff is a staple cereal crop grown mainly in the Ethiopian highlands"
}
